rooms.name: Hidden Demiplane (Interior)

monsters.name: Halaster Simulacrum
monsters.note: answers three questions: first a lie, then two truths; melts afterward

rooms.gm_note: Thirty-ft stone room: misty portal back, upside-down Halaster portrait. Companion: steering the party here is the level’s main goal — Halaster facetime. Tossing the mask back through lets others enter.

rooms.label: 24a
rooms.name: Old Gate
rooms.gm_note: West tunnel exits to the expanded dungeon (or uncharted depths).

rooms.name: Hidden Demiplane (Alcove)
rooms.gm_note: Bas-relief harpist with inscription. Stepping in while wearing the bronze mask from 21 transports you to the demiplane; anchoring objects are sheared off.

rooms.label: 24b
rooms.name: Dead Mage
rooms.gm_note: Remains of the tiefling wizard whose withered heart waits in 14b.

rooms.label: 26d
rooms.name: Mirror Gate to Level 10
rooms.gm_note: Gate of the Elder Wand: touch the mirror with a charged magic wand to open for 1 minute; 11th level required; first passage triggers an elder rune. Exits at level 10 area 8.

rooms.label: 26a
rooms.name: Hall of Many Candles
rooms.gm_note: Fifty ever-burning floating candles in 25 niches; conspicuously clean (the cube’s work). Dispel magic breaks them all.

rooms.label: 26c
rooms.name: Ooze Your Janitor?

monsters.name: Gelatinous Cube
monsters.note: just around the corner; surprises anyone with passive Perception below 15

rooms.gm_note: The cube keeps the Clean Tunnels clean.
